title: Find a good-first-issue in a transcription repo and propose a fix
goal: Find a GitHub issue labeled 'good first issue' in a transcription repository and propose a fix.
constraints: Repository must be related to audio/video transcription
Issue must be labeled 'good first issue'
Proposed fix must be plausible (mentions specific file, function, or test)
final_answer: Issue: openai/whisper #2456 'Add VAD pre-filter option'. Fix: extend transcribe() to accept vad_filter=True and call webrtcvad on the audio array before decoding, gated by a new --vad-filter CLI flag in transcribe.py.
rubric: Real labeled issue, in a real transcription repo, with a concrete fix that names a file, function, or change.
notes: Snapshot reference. Live grader accepts any concrete fix referencing repository files.
